title: T1 Claims MSI 2025 Championship After Epic 5-Game Series
summary: Faker leads T1 to another international title, defeating Gen.G in a thrilling grand final.

title: BLG Dominates LPL Spring Split with Record-Breaking Performance
summary: Bilibili Gaming finishes the regular season 14-2, earning the top seed for playoffs.

title: Patch 15.10 Brings Major Changes to Bot Lane Meta
summary: ADC itemization overhaul shifts the meta as Infinity Edge and Navori see significant changes.

title: Gen.G and T1 Set for Epic LCK Finals Rematch
summary: The two titans of Korean League of Legends prepare for another showdown in the LCK Spring Finals.

title: New Champion Aurora Shakes Up Pro Play with Unique Kit
summary: The Witch Between Worlds sees increasing priority in competitive drafts across all major regions.

title: G2 Esports Locks First Seed for LEC Spring Playoffs
summary: Caps and crew secure a bye into the semifinals after a dominant split performance.
